tools.title: Link Two Sides
tools.desc: Draw lines between matching items — a very common exam question type. Customisable with your own content.

tools.title: Sentence Ordering Quiz
tools.desc: Order scrambled words, sentences or processes. Answers are encrypted so students can't guess from the URL.

tools.title: More Than / Less Than
tools.desc: Comparison tool for numerical reasoning. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: 3D Lollipop Carousel
tools.desc: Choose random names, groups or questions with a beautiful 3D spinning carousel.

tools.title: Mega Spinner
tools.desc: Spin the wheel to choose from large groups of names — perfect for bigger classes.

tools.title: Presentation Spinner
tools.desc: Get two students presenting at once — great for peer assessment activities.

tools.title: Draggable Manipulatives
tools.desc: Drag and drop items for categorisation or grouping activities on a whiteboard.

tools.title: Number Flash Cards
tools.desc: Random number flash card generator. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Debate Picker
tools.desc: Pick a classroom debate topic and assign sides randomly.

tools.title: Priority Triangle
tools.desc: Which concept is most important? Editable words, dictionary look-up and image search built in.

tools.title: ThinkRank Studio
tools.desc: Full ranking suite — Diamond 9, Diamond 5, Triangle, Line ranking, Podium and Elimination mode.

tools.title: Debate Tool
tools.desc: Structure and run a classroom debate with this simple tool.

tools.title: Interactive Mind Map
tools.desc: Visually organize your thoughts, brainstorm ideas, and map out concepts collaboratively.

tools.title: Lateral Thinking Puzzles
tools.desc: Kickstart your class with 100+ lateral thinking puzzles. Includes cryptic hints, full solutions, and a countdown timer.

tools.title: X The Haze
tools.desc: Understand the complexities of rainforest burning and environmental issues in this simulation. Can you avoid bribes and central government detection?

tools.title: Tile Reveal Game
tools.desc: Reveal tiles one by one — who can guess the hidden image first? Great as a starter activity.

tools.title: Image Reveal Spotlight
tools.desc: Spotlight effect to slowly explore an image. Wonderful for younger children investigating a visual stimulus.

tools.title: Image Compare
tools.desc: Overlay two images to compare them — great for Now & Then, or just "which do you prefer?"

tools.title: Pi Day in Space
tools.desc: Interactive Pi Day activities including a quiz, Buffon's needle experiment, and the history of Pi.

tools.title: Ten Frame Tool
tools.desc: Visual ten frames with 4 coloured counters. Choose 1 or 2 frames, horizontal or vertical. Toggle running totals on/off. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Part-Whole Challenges
tools.desc: Interactive part-whole model tool — visually explore fractions, addition and subtraction. Numbers up to 10, 20 or 50. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Missing Number Grids
tools.desc: 5×5 or 10×10 grids with missing numbers for students to fill in. Export to PDF for printing. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Ice Maze — Sentence Builder
tools.desc: Navigate a maze collecting words in the right order to build sentences. Uses the Colourful Semantics approach — 8 progressive stages from simple to complex.

tools.title: Word Cloud
tools.desc: Quickly generate a word cloud from any text. Great for summarising themes in a text.

tools.title: Word Type Highlighter
tools.desc: Highlight nouns, verbs, adjectives and more with school colour codes. Build grammar awareness for young learners. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Word Search Maker
tools.desc: Create custom word searches with your own word list. Multiple grid sizes, upper/lower case support, printable. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Blackout Poetry Creator
tools.desc: Upload any text and use highlighting tools to create blackout poetry. Share or export your creations. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Fun Writing Adventures
tools.desc: Distraction-free writing tool for young learners to practise typing and build writing confidence. Export as a clean document. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Story Dice
tools.desc: Generate story prompts and story net images. Even saves images for you!

tools.title: Plot Device Chooser
tools.desc: Scratch-based story plot device generator for creative writing inspiration.

tools.title: Pixel Art Creator
tools.desc: Create pixel art on 8×8, 16×16 or 32×32 grids. Introduces coordinates and digital art. Export to PDF. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Paint Tool
tools.desc: Simple drawing tool with brush/eraser, adjustable sizes and basic colours. Save as PNG. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: How Many Sleeps?
tools.desc: Count down to birthdays and special events in days, sleeps or hours. Add names and dates, upload via CSV. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Emoji Search & Sheet Coder
tools.desc: Search emojis, get Unicode values and Google Sheets / Excel formulas. Click to copy. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Animal Soundboard
tools.desc: Interactive soundboard with a variety of animal sounds. Perfect for primary storytelling and activities. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Simple Timer
tools.desc: Countdown timer with an end-of-time chime. Set minutes and seconds. Clean, minimal design for any whiteboard. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Pomodoro Timer
tools.desc: Classic 25/5 focus timer to help students manage their work time. Student created.

tools.title: Tutorial Friend
tools.desc: Create step-by-step visual guides and tutorials in seconds. Perfect for teachers building instructions. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: EmeraldLens
tools.desc: Privacy-first video study tool. Capture timestamps, organize notes and export beautiful reports. By Sethi De Clercq.

tools.title: Supply & Demand
tools.desc: Interactive supply and demand curve display tool.

tools.title: Classroom Video Station
tools.desc: Play and manage classroom videos in a safe, distraction-free environment. By Sethi De Clercq.
